CREATE TABLE networks (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET);
SELECT sys.masklen(ip_address) AS netmask_length FROM networks WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.masklen(ip_address) AS netmask_length FROM networks WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM networks WHERE ip_address LIKE '192.168.%');
SELECT n1.ip_address, sys.masklen(n1.ip_address) AS netmask_length FROM networks n1 JOIN networks n2 ON sys.masklen(n1.ip_address) = sys.masklen(n2.ip_address) WHERE n1.id <> n2.id;
SELECT sys.masklen(ip_address) AS netmask_length FROM networks WHERE ip_address NOT IN (inet '10.0.0.1/8', inet '172.16.0.12/16') ORDER BY netmask_length DESC;
SELECT ip_address, sys.masklen(ip_address) AS netmask_length FROM networks WHERE sys.masklen(ip_address) BETWEEN 8 AND 24;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS valid_networks FROM networks WHERE sys.masklen(ip_address) >= 0 AND sys.masklen(ip_address) <= 32;
SELECT DISTINCT sys.masklen(ip_address) AS unique_mask_lengths FROM networks;
SELECT AVG(sys.masklen(ip_address)) AS average_mask_length FROM networks;
